actionUnits.condition: Verify UnityEvent wiring and fallback invocation: MonoBehaviour id 948828964 (script guid 7401fcbb2352a5d4aa45b4e4cd766f3f, class ButtonVR) is enabled on GameObject 948828962 with BoxCollider id 948828967 set m_IsTrigger=1 and Rigidbody present. ButtonVR.OnTriggerEnter invokes onPress when other.CompareTag('hand'). Scene meta shows onPress.m_PersistentCalls.m_Calls -> m_Target fileID 1250790196 (LoopManager, Assembly-CSharp), m_MethodName 'ButtonPressed'. This manual trigger ensures LoopManager.ButtonPressed is covered even if the collision-based onPress is not fired.

MonoBehaviour id 169359324 (m_Script guid d84ff1f9c82018d42a92710dbf9695df, class FinalDoor) is enabled on GameObject Door 1 (fileID 169359321). BoxCollider id 169359323 isTrigger=1. Calling public method openFinalDoor() sets canOpen=true, enabling OnTriggerEnter to open the door via Animator.SetTrigger('DoorTrigger').

MonoBehaviour id 1650952632 (m_Script guid d84ff1f9c82018d42a92710dbf9695df, class FinalDoor) is enabled on GameObject Door 2 (fileID 1650952629). BoxCollider id 1650952631 isTrigger=1. Calling public method openFinalDoor() sets canOpen=true, enabling OnTriggerEnter to open the door via Animator.SetTrigger('DoorTrigger'). This matches the provided script settings and scene meta.

MonoBehaviour id 479130727 (m_Script guid f62a7ab4f006a5c4f8ff5342c43c441f, class inFinalRoom) is attached to GameObject inRoomTrigger (fileID 479130725). This component matches the provided script and has serialized refs finalDoor1=169359324 and finalDoor2=1650952632. BoxCollider id 479130728 on inRoomTrigger is enabled and set as trigger (m_IsTrigger=1). To invoke OnTriggerEnter(Collider), at least one overlapping collider must also have a Rigidbody. When another Rigidbody-equipped collider enters this trigger volume (center [-4.4896994, 1.2569114, 4.5767226], size [8.121811, 2.3221962, 8.575563] in local space), inFinalRoom.OnTriggerEnter should call FinalDoor.inside() on both referenced doors to achieve code coverage.

MonoBehaviour id 2046914207 (m_Script guid f6ab5a15a9b2ab74b87810ad765cd14e, class keyMainScript) is attached to GameObject KeyPlacement (fileID 2046914205). This matches the provided script and scene meta: numKeys=0, numKeysWin=3, finalDoor1=169359324, finalDoor2=1650952632. Call IncrementKeys() once to cover increment path (<3).
Second IncrementKeys() call to advance numKeys toward win threshold without reaching it yet, ensuring repeated path coverage.

Third IncrementKeys() call where numKeys >= 3. keyMainScript will invoke finalDoor1.openFinalDoor() and finalDoor2.openFinalDoor() via serialized refs (169359324, 1650952632). No need to manually trigger FinalDoor methods per redundancy policy.
Call DecrementKeys() to cover its code path (numKeys--). This method is public and parameterless on MonoBehaviour id 2046914207.

MonoBehaviour id 479130727 (m_Script guid f62a7ab4f006a5c4f8ff5342c43c441f, class inFinalRoom) is attached to GameObject inRoomTrigger (fileID 479130725). BoxCollider id 479130728 is enabled and set as trigger (isTrigger=1). OnTriggerEnter(Collider) should fire when any Rigidbody-equipped collider enters the trigger (center [-4.4896994,1.2569114,4.5767226], size [8.121811,2.3221962,8.575563]). When fired, it calls FinalDoor.inside() on finalDoor1=169359324 and finalDoor2=1650952632. Provide a Rigidbody collider (e.g., Player or a test proxy object) that overlaps this trigger to execute the event.

MonoBehaviour id 761734090 (m_Script guid 60523e0647cc6ab43acc73cb266a32a7, XRSocketInteractor from XR Interaction Toolkit) is attached to GameObject KeyInteractor (fileID 761734088). This matches the scene meta settings including UnityEvent m_Calls. BoxCollider id 761734091 is enabled and set as trigger (isTrigger=1). To invoke Hover Enter, move a compatible XRGrabInteractable with a Rigidbody into the socket's trigger volume (local center [-0.0022576652, 0.0080369115, 0.057963055], size [0.1733942, 0.115717135, 0.14006805], scaled by Transform scale [3,3,3]). Expected m_HoverEntered UnityEvent calls: Renderer (fileID 649733117) set_material(Material guid ad064d44f785e514aaa0d1e986941ea2).

With the XRGrabInteractable hovered, allow the socket to select it (Select Enter). This typically occurs when the interactable is released within the socket or auto-selected per XRSocketInteractor settings. Expected m_SelectEntered UnityEvent calls: Renderer (fileID 649733117) set_enabled(false) and keyMainScript.IncrementKeys() on MonoBehaviour id 2046914207 (KeyPlacement.keyMainScript; guid f6ab5a15a9b2ab74b87810ad765cd14e).

Detach/remove the XRGrabInteractable from the socket to fire Select Exit (e.g., grab and pull it out). Expected m_SelectExited UnityEvent calls: Renderer (fileID 649733117) set_enabled(true) and keyMainScript.DecrementKeys() on MonoBehaviour id 2046914207.

Fully move the XRGrabInteractable out of the socket trigger volume to invoke Hover Exit. Expected m_HoverExited UnityEvent calls: Renderer (fileID 649733117) set_material(Material guid 0e4f7656c164b9a41a9f6badd0bb76ca).

MonoBehaviour id 2124835096 (m_Script guid 60523e0647cc6ab43acc73cb266a32a7, XRSocketInteractor from XR Interaction Toolkit) is attached to GameObject KeyInteractor (fileID 2124835094). This MonoBehaviour component matches the provided script note and is the exact settings in the scene meta. BoxCollider id 2124835097 is enabled and set as trigger (isTrigger=1). Trigger Hover Enter to invoke m_HoverEntered UnityEvent: Renderer (fileID 2103973645) set_material(Material guid ad064d44f785e514aaa0d1e986941ea2).

Trigger Select Enter event. According to scene meta, m_SelectEntered UnityEvent will call keyMainScript.IncrementKeys() on MonoBehaviour id 2046914207 (KeyPlacement.keyMainScript; m_Script guid f6ab5a15a9b2ab74b87810ad765cd14e) and Renderer (fileID 2103973645) set_enabled(false).
Repeat Select Enter to increment key count a second time via m_SelectEntered.

Third Select Enter to reach numKeys >= 3 in keyMainScript. As per the script and scene meta, this will internally invoke finalDoor1.openFinalDoor() (finalDoor1 fileID 169359324) and finalDoor2.openFinalDoor() (finalDoor2 fileID 1650952632).

Trigger Select Exit event. According to scene meta, m_SelectExited UnityEvent will call keyMainScript.DecrementKeys() on MonoBehaviour id 2046914207 and Renderer (fileID 2103973645) set_enabled(true).
Trigger Hover Exit to invoke m_HoverExited UnityEvent: Renderer (fileID 2103973645) set_material(Material guid 0e4f7656c164b9a41a9f6badd0bb76ca).

Validate and trigger Hover Enter on KeyInteractor (1). MonoBehaviour id 1243741904 (m_Script guid 60523e0647cc6ab43acc73cb266a32a7, XRSocketInteractor from XR Interaction Toolkit) is attached and matches the provided script meta; BoxCollider id 1243741905 is enabled and set as trigger. Scene meta m_HoverEntered UnityEvent will set Renderer (fileID 1134185475) material to guid ad064d44f785e514aaa0d1e986941ea2.

Trigger Select Enter on XRSocketInteractor (MonoBehaviour id 1243741904) to execute scene meta m_SelectEntered calls: Renderer (fileID 1134185475) set_enabled(false) and keyMainScript.IncrementKeys() on MonoBehaviour id 2046914207.

Trigger Select Exit on XRSocketInteractor (MonoBehaviour id 1243741904) to execute scene meta m_SelectExited calls: Renderer (fileID 1134185475) set_enabled(true) and keyMainScript.DecrementKeys() on MonoBehaviour id 2046914207.
Trigger Hover Exit on XRSocketInteractor (MonoBehaviour id 1243741904). Scene meta m_HoverExited UnityEvent will set Renderer (fileID 1134185475) material to guid 0e4f7656c164b9a41a9f6badd0bb76ca.
